tagline: Finances, habits, goals and notes in one place. Manage your life with intention.
loginPrompt: Log in to manage your data
passwordHint: At least 8 characters, one letter and one digit
haveAccount: Already have an account – log in
forgotPasswordPrompt: Enter your account email — we'll send a link to set a new password.
forgotPasswordSent: If the account exists, we've sent a password reset link. Check your inbox.
setNewPasswordPrompt: Set a new password for your account.
resetLinkInvalid: Missing reset token. Open the link from the email again or request a new one.
passwordResetSuccess: Password updated. You can now log in.
networkError: Can't connect to the server. Make sure the backend is running (port 3002).
